arts.ttl: Niklas Beste: Who is the former Heidenheim maestro back in the Bundesliga with Freiburg?
arts.sum: An astonishing 12 goals and 13 assists saw Beste fire Heidenheim to a fairy-tale promotion, completing a rise from the regional leagues to the Bundesliga for the very first time. Heidenheim then signed Beste after finishing sixth in Bundesliga 2 under long-serving coach Frank Schmidt, and the rest is German football history!

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund’s Mike Tullberg welcomes Niko Kovac: “A new era begins.”
arts.sum: Mike Tullberg will take charge of his second Bundesliga game on Saturday when Borussia Dortmund play at Heidenheim. On Sunday, the interim coach will pass the baton to Niko Kovac,…

arts.ttl: USMNT Transfers: New twists in Ricardo Pepi saga at PSV, Gio Reyna continues to fight at Dortmund, Caleb Wiley on the move
arts.sum: The USMNT Transfer Notebook tracks American player movements, with latest developments for those in the U.S. national team pool We're just days away from the end of the transfer window and, at times, it looked as if sparks could fly in this final stretch.

arts.ttl: Kovac's salary and special clause at Dortmund revealed
arts.sum: German tabloid Bild has revealed the salary Niko Kovac will earn as part of his contract with Borussia Dortmund, which apparently includes a special clause.

arts.ttl: Dortmund weigh up bid for Lyon star
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Borussia Dortmund are considering whether to launch a bid for Olympique Lyon's Rayan Cherki before the transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Champions League knockout phase play-off draw: Bayern and Dortmund discover opponents
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have been drawn against Celtic in the knockout phase play-offs of the Champions League. Borussia Dortmund, meanwhile, will face Sporting CP.

arts.ttl: Heidenheim vs Dortmund preview: Tullberg seeks to depart with three points
arts.sum: Heidenheim and Borussia Dortmund look to return to winning ways in Bundesliga when they meet in cozy Voith-Arena on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Champions League draw LIVE with Liverpool, Arsenal and Villa's paths and Man City's huge tie
arts.sum: While eight clubs have already booked their place in the Champions League's round of 16, another 16 - including some of the competition's biggest hitters - face a play-off round

arts.ttl: Preview: Heidenheim vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Heidenheim and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: UEFA Champions League star Serhou Guirassy set to lead Borussia Dortmund revival
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy’s name on the scoresheet in the UEFA Champions League has become a familiar sight this campaign, with the 29-year-old netting goals eight and nine of the campaign against Shakhtar Donetsk to move joint-top of the competition’s scoring charts. After four games in the Bundesliga without a goal at the end of 2024 – something of a drought by his standards – BVB ’s No.9 has already struck twice in four games this year, and has five in six outings in total.
